message:
bd-3oaig.8: add direction cycling, recompute indicator, and throttle tests

- Add direction_override field to MermaidMegaState with CycleDirection action
  cycling TB → LR → RL → BT → auto (None). Overrides IR direction before layout.
- Add 'O' (uppercase) key binding for direction cycling
- Add "Recomputed: Nms ago" indicator in side panel (visible for 2s after layout)
- Show direction in controls panel status line (Dir:auto/TB/LR/RL/BT)
- Add 7 tests: direction cycling through all values, analysis epoch bump,
  status log verification, debounce field init, layout/force relayout bumps

The existing debounce mechanism (50ms window, budget-aware) already satisfies
the throttling/coalescing acceptance criteria. Generator controls (size, branching,
density, label_len, seed) and layout mode cycling (Dense/Normal/Spacious/Auto)
satisfy the size/spacing/orientation controls requirement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
